title: EDI@Energy Code Lists
description: Allowed qualifier/code values for each data element in one release.

schema_version.description: Schema version number. Current maximum supported version is 1. Versions higher than MAX_SCHEMA_VERSION in xtask/src/codegen.rs are rejected. Additive-only changes do not require a version bump.

release.description: Must match the release directory and the release field in mig.json / ahb.json.

lists.description: Map from DE/qualifier identifier to the exhaustive set of allowed code values.
